description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Late. Currencies: riyal, fundukli, maḥbūb, qurūsh. The mention of Ottoman fundukli coinage makes it possible to date this fragment as post-1725 CE.
tags: fonducli, Ancona, account, fattoria, numismatic dating
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בJudaeo-Arabic, Western Arabic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
